ACS.name: Architecture Compliance Score
ACS.description: Measures adherence to architectural invariants and directory structure.

OCS.name: Operations Compliance Score
OCS.description: Measures operational readiness, CI health, and repository configuration.

SCS.name: Security Compliance Score
SCS.description: Measures repository secret coverage, secure defaults, and dependency health.

A11Y.name: Accessibility Score
A11Y.description: Measures adherence to WCAG accessibility guidelines.

PCS.name: Performance Compliance Score
PCS.description: Measures web performance and bundle size.

KGHS.name: Knowledge Graph Health Score
KGHS.description: Measures the structural integrity of the canonical knowledge graph.

EQS.name: Editorial Quality Score
EQS.description: Measures the editorial completeness and alignment with the Editorial Constitution.
